    浪漫至死不渝__墨香铜臭。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8HIir8L0CZChcjse17RKZzSIz4TZBC2VzzexuQfej6H","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6dd51514f894e24998ad6139640655b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536761&x-signature=X4iDSt5k%2FpgLNQ9ETOBtN4woQzs%3D","user_id":"1723683593264382","user_name":"，Dreamboat"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1723683593264382","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1736132766,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7563157432034135064","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流】+【惊悚逃生副本】+【不修仙智斗】

“齐秋水，我是夏潇潇，当你看到这条消息时，我已经死了。”
 
“待会儿千万不要点开血门论坛！！千万不要！！”
 
已死去的夏潇潇发来的诡异消息、神秘的血门论坛，再加上那辆穿梭于现实与虚幻的诡异大巴，将齐秋水卷入了无限流的副本之中。
 
灯火通明的酒店走廊里，转头便能望见每一层的景象。

一样的门框，一样的装饰，每层都有数之不尽的房间。
 
酒店的每一层都对应着一个级别的血门副本。
层级越高的房间，门后副本难度越高。
每个房间的门后都藏着一个独特的故事。

世人只知鬼恐怖，鬼却深知人心毒。
 
无数和齐秋水一样被诅咒的人，都被迫参与一个个血门副本。

血门副本内的诡异凶险，加上玩家之间的相互陷害，让齐秋水一次次陷入险境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/170bd6e14a29905394e75c313d3e5e5e","author":"土豆超人88","author_id":"","book_id":"7563157432034135064","book_name":"无限恐惧：惊悚酒店","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7962人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7563158842473710104","read_count":"7962","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"885111"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"383","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,副本,求生,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/247a83c99e3be6f9ef8d670b8f637b84~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183800&x-signature=fSs%2Ft%2Be8RIu3RkwtMhm6KBeGE6w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4418257585708876","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017432047491C592FB6970EBC83"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_
